display_text: Power Treads, Cost: 1400: Boots that provide +25 Attack Speed and +10 to a selected attribute (Strength, Agility, or Intelligence). display_text: Power Treads, Cost: 1400: Provides versatile utility and stats for farming heroes. The attribute switching allows efficient stat allocation for health (Strength), damage/armor (Agility), or mana pool/spell damage (Intelligence) as needed. The movement speed increase aids in lane positioning and chasing. A cost-effective upgrade for carries and cores that accelerates farm through attack speed and adaptable stats.

display_text: Power Treads, Cost: 1400: Core item for heroes who benefit from attack speed and efficient stat allocation, particularly mana-intensive spellcasters who can swap to Intelligence for casting then to Strength for survivability, or Agility carries who use attack speed. Synergizes with heroes like Phantom Assassin, Medusa, or Zeus who can leverage the stat switching mechanics for optimal resource management and damage output.
